notes:
batch-A (59 entries, app/src/terminal/view.rs continuing from batch-14's batch-B).

Action breakdown:
- translate: 57 entries (menu items, a11y content, banners, tooltips, error toasts, loading text)
- panic_message: 2 entries (.expect() strings at lines 16052 and 23539)
- bilingual_search_terms: 0

Key decisions:
- 'block' consistently translated as '命令块' per glossary.
- 'Find within block'/'Find within blocks' both → '在命令块中查找' (Chinese has no singular/plural inflection — same translation acceptable; same applies to Scroll to top/bottom of block(s)).
- 'Bookmark' → '书签'; 'Toggle Bookmark block' → '切换命令块书签'.
- 'Powerlevel10k now supports Warp!  ' preserves trailing two spaces; '!' → '！' (full-width).
- 'You seem to be running an older (unsupported) version, please follow ' preserves trailing single space; '()' → '（）' since surrounding text is Chinese.
- ' to update to the latest version.' preserves leading space; '.' → '。'.
- 'Pure is not yet supported in Warp. ... alternative.  ' preserves trailing two spaces.
- 'Started at: {}'/'\nCompleted at: {}' preserve newline shape and the strftime-rendered placeholder.
- a11y content with placeholders (Block {}, etc.) keeps {} positions identical.
- '... .' → '……' for ASCII ellipsis (e.g. 'Starting shell...' → '正在启动 shell……'; 'Loading session...' → '正在加载会话……'; 'Share block...' → '分享命令块……').
- 'Warpify' kept as Warpify (no Chinese equivalent, per batch-14 precedent).
- 'rewind' → '倒带' per glossary.
- 'Explain the following:\n' preserves trailing newline; ':' → '：'.
- 'What is the command to: ' preserves trailing single space; ':' → '：'.
- 'SSH Session' / 'SSH session' both translate to '会话' since Chinese has no case distinction.
- 'PowerShell subshells not supported' kept PowerShell as brand; 'subshell' kept English (technical term).
- 'Can not invoke environment variable subshell in a non-local session' kept subshell English.
- 'Block {index}: {}, {}.\n' — the {} placeholders substitute block.command_to_string() (English commands) and status strings ('failed, status code N' / 'background' / 'succeeded' / 'in progress'). Per contract §2 the surrounding Chinese should not directly prepend Chinese function-words to the English-substituted {}, so the structure '命令块 {index}：{}，{}。\n' keeps {} bracketed by neutral punctuation.
- 'git repository' → 'Git 仓库' (Git capitalized per glossary).

Panic messages (target=null):
- L16052 'Expected at least one block to be selected.' on .expect()
- L23539 'Handle should be available' on .expect()
